conclusions.fixed_header_diff_focus: actual on-disk second fbrowser0 record event_offset differs: single-page working uses 0x207 while multi-page page1 failing uses 0x1E5
conclusions.narrowing: the failing page1 file-browser probe does not differ from the working single-page file-browser in its A-type user-slot body or mirror-value tail. the meaningful on-disk single-object delta is the second fbrowser0 record event_offset, but even patching that field to the working on-disk value does not recover enumeration. the remaining structural delta is therefore pushed outward into surrounding multi-page page-header/mirror-page-header machinery.
